entries.title: What Zip Slip is and where to look
entries.body:
An archive with traversal names (../../shell.php) writes files OUTSIDE the target folder on extraction -> overwrite and RCE.
Where to look: any archive import/upload (zip, tar, jar, war, cpio, apk, rar, 7z) that the server later extracts.
Goal: overwrite an executable/config file and wait for it to be invoked (or invoke it yourself).

entries.title: Example of a malicious archive (traversal names)
evilarc — archive with traversal
entries.body: python evilarc.py shell.php -o unix -f shell.zip -p var/www/html/ -d 15

entries.title: Tools
entries.body:
evilarc — tar/zip with directory traversal.
slipit (usdAG) — ZipSlip archive generator.
List of vulnerable libraries/projects: snyk/zip-slip-vulnerability.
